environment: real GitHub repo febufenn-cyber/cook-anything-staging-pub (dedicated staging; NEVER production) + local Supabase stack

scenarios.detail: operator exited 3 after branch creation with no PR; a later worker (post claim-expiry) resumed on the empty branch, opened exactly one draft PR, recorded it
resumed worker verified the existing commit's evidence file (candidateId + contentHash) and reused it — no second commit; single draft PR; recorded
PR existed but candidate stayed 'claimed' (unrecorded); resumed worker adopted the existing draft PR — NO duplicate — and recorded pr_open
a same-named branch with foreign content and no matching evidence file was refused (existing_unrelated_branch_refused); nothing overwritten; no PR opened
GITHUB_REPOSITORY outside the allowlist rejected (publication_repository_not_allowlisted) before any GitHub side effect

invariantsProven: candidate ID + content-hash verified before branch reuse
atomic claim + token from migration 000700 gates recording
one PR per candidate under crash+resume
note: Operator idempotency implemented in scripts/open-publication-candidate-pr.ts (githubMaybe404 resume checks, crashPoint injection hook for tests only).
